        SELECT
          V.*,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

            ORDER BY "AUDIT_ID" DESC, "ODQ_ENTITYCNTR" DESC

    "BUKRS" VARCHAR,
    "KUNNR" VARCHAR,
    "LAND1" VARCHAR,
    "WAERS" VARCHAR,
    "PERIV" VARCHAR,
    "ODQ_CHANGEMODE" VARCHAR,
    "ODQ_ENTITYCNTR" VARCHAR,
    "AUDIT_ID" VARCHAR,
    CONSTRAINT PK_T_0SALESORG_ATTR PRIMARY KEY ("VKORG")
    );
scripts.merge_apply:
MERGE INTO SAP.P07.T_0SALESORG_ATTR T
    USING (
      SELECT * FROM (
        SELECT
          V.*,
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY "VKORG"
            ORDER BY "AUDIT_ID" DESC, "ODQ_ENTITYCNTR" DESC
          ) AS _RN
        FROM SAP_LANDING.P07.VW_0SALESORG_ATTR V
      )
      WHERE _RN = 1
    ) S
    ON T."VKORG" = S."VKORG"
    
WHEN MATCHED AND S."ODQ_CHANGEMODE" = 'D' THEN DELETE

    WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
        T."VKORG" = S."VKORG",
    T."WAERS_V" = S."WAERS_V",
    T."BUKRS" = S."BUKRS",
    T."KUNNR" = S."KUNNR",
    T."LAND1" = S."LAND1",
    T."WAERS" = S."WAERS",
    T."PERIV" = S."PERIV",
    T."ODQ_CHANGEMODE" = S."ODQ_CHANGEMODE",
    T."ODQ_ENTITYCNTR" = S."ODQ_ENTITYCNTR",
    T."AUDIT_ID" = S."AUDIT_ID"

    WHEN NOT MATCHED AND (S."ODQ_CHANGEMODE" IS NULL OR S."ODQ_CHANGEMODE" <> 'D') THEN INSERT
    ("VKORG", "WAERS_V", "BUKRS", "KUNNR", "LAND1", "WAERS", "PERIV", "ODQ_CHANGEMODE", "ODQ_ENTITYCNTR", "AUDIT_ID")
    VALUES
    (S."VKORG", S."WAERS_V", S."BUKRS", S."KUNNR", S."LAND1", S."WAERS", S."PERIV", S."ODQ_CHANGEMODE", S."ODQ_ENTITYCNTR", S."AUDIT_ID");
